unit_of_work: Q02 ONINIT infrastructure repair and staged requeue
strategy_shape: Low-frequency H4 SMA(100) close-cross trend following on ten liquid forex pairs

source.title: The Truth Behind Commonly Used Indicators
source.author: Cristina Ciurea
source.source_results: Four-year published tables: EURUSD 216 trades and +29.86%; GBPUSD 269 trades and +55.08%

diversity_rationale: The current Q08 soft survivors are concentrated in indices, metals, and energy. This candidate adds ten FX carriers and a slower H4 trend sleeve.

prior_failure.diagnosis: The EA had an active ea_id_registry row but no magic_numbers.csv or resolver entries for any target symbol. Legacy setfiles also assigned slot 0 to every symbol and omitted the card strategy parameters.

source_changes: Use framework-pooled closed-price readers instead of raw iClose calls.
Fail closed on a non-H4 host chart.
Initialize every QM_EntryRequest field and zero the request before use.
Keep management and hard exits above the entry-only news blackout.
Default the source risk inputs to the backtest-safe RISK_FIXED mode.
repair.setfile_change: Regenerated ten H4 backtest setfiles with unique magic slots, card strategy defaults, current build hashes, RISK_FIXED=1000, and RISK_PERCENT=0.
repair.spec_change: Added a complete Q01 SPEC.md and the approved build-time strategy-card copy.

q02_requeue.duplicate_guard: The standard auto-Q02 helper found no pending or active QM5_11914 work item before insertion.
